Domen Hribernik

Developer & Tech Enthusiast Razvijalec & Ljubitelj Tehnologije

About Me O Meni

About Me O meni

I'm a Computer Science student at the University of Maribor, Slovenia. I have a deep passion for technology and innovation, specializing in programming, software development, and problem-solving. I am always eager to apply my skills and collaborate on exciting projects. Let's work together to achieve your goals! Sem študent računalništva na Univerzi v Mariboru. Navdušujejo me tehnologija in inovacije, s poudarkom na programiranju, razvoju programske opreme in reševanju kompleksnih problemov. Vedno sem pripravljen uporabiti svoje znanje za sodelovanje pri navdihujočih projektih. Skupaj lahko dosežemo vaše cilje!

My Projects Moji Projekti

Vita Mavrič Portfolio

This project showcases a custom-built, responsive website for Vita Mavrič, built in HTML, CSS and vanilla JavaScript (Vanilla Stack). Ta projekt predstavlja po meri custom-built, responsive spletno stran za Vito Mavrič, izdelano z uporabo HTML, CSS in JavaScript (Vanilla Stack). vitamavric.com

Virtual Runner (Thesis) Virtual Runner (Diploma)

My thesis focuses on creating a digital twin of a runner. This project integrates multiple subprojects into a unified application to demonstrate the practical use of various technologies. The application consists of:

Moja diplomska naloga se osredotoča na izdelavo digitalnega dvojčka tekača. Projekt združuje več podprojektov v enotno aplikacijo, ki prikazuje praktično uporabo različnih tehnologij. Aplikacija vsebuje podprojekte:

 Read More

Wordle Bot

A Python bot for the game Wordle that uses algorithmic strategies to solve puzzles efficiently. This project demonstrates the application of AI techniques to play and solve word games. Python bot za igro Wordle, ki uporablja algoritmične strategije za učinkovito reševanje problemov. Ta projekt prikazuje uporabo umetne inteligence za igranje in reševanje besednih iger. GitHub

"Work like you don't need the money. Love like you've never been hurt. Dance like nobody's watching."

Satchel Paige
